posts.author: ranvir
posts.text: Glenmark Pharma - Q4 FY 26 concall highlights - Riyaltris launch in US and Winlevi in EU should be key growth drivers in FY 27 Have got 180 days exclusivity for gFLOVENT ( anti-asthmatic inhaler ). Shall be launching in FY 27. Have also got 180 exclusivity for gFLONASE. Also slated for a FY 27 launch Launched Tevimbra and Brukinsa in India in Q1 - seeing good response from the mkt Launched Nebsmart in India in Q3 LY - world’s first triple molecule combo for treatment of COPD. Like Riyaltris, this is an in-house innovation Their OTC brands like - Candid ( anti fungal dusting powder ), Scalpe (…
